commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a TUI Markdown preprocessor that preserves Python dunder and snake_case identifiers before pi-tui rendering, plus ChatLog and PTY harness regressions for the linked TUI display bug.

PR surface: Source +142, Tests +133. Total +275 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is clear for inline dunder identifiers: current main sends raw text into pi-tui Markdown/Marked, whose inline renderer consumes underscore emphasis. I did not run a live current-main PTY repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed from this review because there are no blocking findings; the remaining action is normal maintainer review plus CI/broad-gate completion.

target.title: fix(tui): preserve Python underscore identifiers
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve Python underscore identifiers in the TUI Markdown wrapper before pi-tui/marked can treat them as emphasis.
- Keep existing Markdown behavior for fenced code, inline code, links, URLs, raw HTML spans/tags, and normal underscore emphasis.
- Add ChatLog and PTY harness regressions for #90769 so the final TUI path proves dunder and snake_case rendering.

Fixes #90769.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/tui/components/hyperlink-markdown.ts src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts src/tui/tui-pty-harness.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --base upstream/main`
- `pnpm changed:lanes --json --base upstream/main --head HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

`OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base upstream/main --head HEAD` was attempted locally, but it produced no output before the 10-minute timeout. Focused TUI proof and autoreview are clean; CI should cover the broader changed gate.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: TUI Markdown rendering now preserves Python dunder identifiers such as `__name__`, `__main__`, `__init__`, and common dunder method names, plus snake_case identifiers such as `is_palindrome`.
Real environment tested: local macOS source checkout with the OpenClaw fake-backend TUI PTY harness running the real `runTui()` terminal loop.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`.
Evidence after fix: PTY harness test `renders Python dunder identifiers through the terminal markdown path` waits for visible terminal output containing `Use __name__ == "__main__" before calling __init__().`, `if __name__ == "__main__":`, `def is_palindrome(s: str) -> bool:`, `__name__`, `is_palindrome`, and `stay literal.`.
Observed result after fix: the PTY lane passed with 14 tests, and the ChatLog component lane passed with 24 tests covering fenced code, inline code, dunder prose, long fences, raw HTML tags, and normal underscore emphasis.
What was not tested: full `check:changed` via Testbox/Crabbox was not completed locally because the local Crabbox binary failed its sanity check and the local child-mode fallback timed out after 10 minutes without output.
